brand_line: We make sure your data is discoverable, governed, and out of the wrong hands — wherever it lives.

pains.title: AI is pulling sensitive data into models faster than security can see it.
Access governance is broken across hundreds of SaaS apps.
DLP rollups are failing the audit in regulated industries.

differentiation: Catches sensitive data flowing into AI models in minutes, not weeks — across every cloud and SaaS app.
Auto-revokes stale and over-provisioned access without breaking the workflows people actually use.
Generates audit-ready DLP rollups by control family, not by tool — so auditors stop asking the same question twice.
outcomes: Cut sensitive-data exposure investigations from 14 days to 90 minutes at a Fortune-100 retailer.
Removed 41% of over-provisioned SaaS access in the first 60 days at a global insurer.
Reduced audit prep from 6 weeks to 4 days at a regional bank.
power_plays: Target large enterprises moving genAI to production; trigger on a public AI policy announcement; lead with the AI Data Discovery 30-day exposure scan; aim for a CISO + CDO joint pilot meeting.
Target enterprises with 200+ SaaS apps; trigger on a Workday or Okta consolidation project; lead with the access-review ROI calculator; aim for a SaaS access audit workshop.

Target regulated industries (financial services, healthcare, utilities); trigger on a regulator finding or a new control-family mandate; lead with the audit-rollup before/after walkthrough; aim for a quarterly compliance review.
